phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso per i tavoli storici, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so per ee TAH-voh-li STOH-ree-kee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: In fondo al locale, a sinistra.
likely_response.pronunciation: EEN FOHN-doh AHL loh-KAH-leh AH see-NEE-strah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the venue, on the left.

responses.english: At the back of the venue, on the left.
responses.phonetic: EEN FOHN-doh AHL loh-KAH-leh AH see-NEE-strah
responses.local: In fondo al locale, a sinistra.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il bicerin, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah eel bee-CHEH-rin, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: È indicato nel menu sul tavolo.
likely_response.pronunciation: È een-dee-KAH-toh NEHL MEH-noo SOOL tah-VOH-loh
likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated in the menu on the table.

responses.english: It is indicated in the menu on the table.
responses.phonetic: È een-dee-KAH-toh NEHL MEH-noo SOOL tah-VOH-loh
responses.local: È indicato nel menu sul tavolo.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, ci sono posti liberi nelle salette storiche, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, chee SOH-noh POH-stee LEE-beh-ree nel-leh sah-LET-teh STOH-ree-keh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the moment they are all occupied.

responses.english: At the moment they are all occupied.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il bagno per i clienti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel BAH-nyoh per ee klee-EN-tee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the back, near the cash register.

responses.english: At the back, near the cash register.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si ordina il bicerin al banco, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see OR-dee-nah eel bee-CHEH-rin al BAN-koh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Si ordina direttamente qui al banco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE ohr-DEE-nah dee-reht-tah-MEHN-teh KW-ee AHL BAHN-koh
likely_response.translation_en: You order directly here at the counter.

responses.english: You order directly here at the counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE ohr-DEE-nah dee-reht-tah-MEHN-teh KW-ee AHL BAHN-koh
responses.local: Si ordina direttamente qui al banco.
